channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.3.0

  • Redesigned language picker — Select transcription language from a clean scrollable list with checkmarks, replacing the old radio-group style
  • Fixed stale transcription state — Starting a new transcription now correctly resets the previous result instead of showing the old "Transcription complete" banner
  • Improved History view — Search by title or platform, date groups (Today / Yesterday / This Week / Older) with item counts, hover-reveal actions (re-download, copy URL, delete), and confirm-before-clear
